title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Aman Resorts India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Aman Resorts India
jsonLd.description:
We at Aman Resorts India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aman Resorts India:
Aman Resorts India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India!
